name: Elachuridae
description: Elachuridae is a monotypic family of passerine bird found in the eastern Himalayas and Southeast Asia. The single species is a secretive, wren-like bird that was formerly placed with the babbler family.

children.name: Elachura
children.description: A monotypic genus of small, dark, wren-like passerine found in Asian montane forests.

children.name: Elachura formosa
children.description: The Spotted Elachura is a tiny, dark brown bird heavily spotted and barred with white and black. It skulks in dense undergrowth in moist montane forests from the eastern Himalayas to southern China and Southeast Asia.
